message:
refactor(core): thread persist_ctx through API calls and standardize formatting

Core (ffs-core/src/lib.rs):
- Add &alloc.persist_ctx parameter to ffs_inode::set_times calls in
  unlink and rename paths
- Add &alloc.persist_ctx parameter to ffs_extent::allocate_extent in
  mkdir path
- Refactor JBD2 transaction variable name (writer -> jbd2_writer)
- Simplify btrfs parent inode lookup chain with .map_or() idiom
- Add #[allow(clippy::option_if_let_else)] for conditional lock path

Formatting (ffs-alloc, ffs-btree, ffs-block):
- Break long function calls and parameter lists for readability
- Align closing parens in pattern matches (bw_tree Split case)
- Reflow try_alloc_inode_in_group_persist call formatting
- Minor block crate formatting alignment

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
